text:
The Gothic Newscaster is a newscaster that reported the incident in Pata City involving the former Squadron Leader Cheetu. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 21, Chapter 218 

Appearance

The Gothic Newscaster has neatly coiffed hair parted to the left and dead fish-like eyes with two tiny heart tattoos under her left eye. She has two vine-like tattoos running down the left and right sides of her neck and tiny eyebrows. She wears dark-colored lipstick on her lips and has a horizontal scar across her forehead (in the manga). 

She wears a dark-colored dress suit with a jeweled cross on each sleeve and two jawless skulls near the top left and right sides of her dress shirt. Under the dress shirt, she wears a frilly lace dress shirt. She has a single ring on almost every finger, two skulls, and crossbones (☠) hair clips on the left side of her head. As well as a nail embedded into the upper right side of her head and the lower left side of her head, two ear piercings on her left ear. 

Personality

The Gothic Newscaster has a stolid demeanor and speaks in a candid, monotone voice. 

Plot

Chimera Ant arc

The Gothic Newscaster reports the incident in Pata City involving a mysterious creature. She elaborates on how the mysterious creature killed seven residents and wounded several police officers after escaping to the Miera Mountains. Before the mysterious creature evaded capture, he proclaimed, "I'll be back tomorrow" and "Bring someone faster". The mysterious creature then ran off at 125 m.p.h. This has led to speculation that it is a new type of Magical Beast. Residents in the nearby periphery were given a mandatory evacuation order, and the local government has submitted a capture request to the Hunter Association. 

Manga Appearances

Trivia

Anime and Manga Differences

The Gothic Newscaster's vertical scar is omitted in the 2011 anime adaptation. Hunter × Hunter - Episode 93 (2011) 

Miscellaneous

The Gothic Newscaster shares the same Japanese voice actor as the 2011 anime adaptation of the The Breath of the Archangel.
